reasoning: The original release date for Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse was March 2024, but it was indefinitely delayed in July 2023 due to the Hollywood strikes. A recent article published in March 2025, citing the industry trade publication Deadline, explicitly reported that Sony has 'no plans' to release the film in 2025. Given that it is already mid-March 2025 and there is no release date, marketing campaign, or finished production, it is impossible for such a massive animated blockbuster to be released before the end of the year. The Manifold crowd correctly priced this at a 1% probability in early March 2025. Consequently, the probability of release in 2025 is as close to zero as possible.
